name: MaxMind GeoIP2 API
what_it_does: Industry-standard IP geolocation and fraud detection service, available as both downloadable database files (GeoLite2/GeoIP2) and a web API with minFraud risk scoring.
use_cases: High-volume IP geolocation using local database files for zero-latency lookups
Fraud risk scoring for transactions with minFraud API
Compliance-based geo-blocking at the infrastructure level
ISP and connection type detection for network analytics
Combining IP intelligence with device fingerprinting for fraud prevention
not_for: Agents needing simple REST API with minimal setup (GeoLite2 DB setup is complex)
Real-time fraud scoring for high-volume consumer apps on free tier
best_when: You need offline/local IP geolocation with no API latency, or enterprise fraud scoring with the minFraud API.
avoid_when: You want a simple REST API without managing database files, or need free/low-cost high-volume lookups.

auth.notes: Account ID and License Key used as HTTP Basic Auth credentials. GeoLite2 database downloads use the same license key. Separate keys for web service vs database downloads.

pricing.free_tier_limits: GeoLite2 databases free with registration; web service: 0 free API calls (database only is free)
pricing.paid_tiers: GeoIP2 Precision web service: $0.0005/request; minFraud: $0.005/query; GeoIP2 databases: $20-200/year
pricing.notes: GeoLite2 (free) vs GeoIP2 (paid) - accuracy differs significantly. GeoLite2 databases are free but require monthly re-download. Web service is pay-per-query.

performance.rate_limits: No published rate limit for web service; database is local so unlimited

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Web service errors use HTTP status codes with JSON body containing code and error fields. Database lookup errors are library-specific.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All lookups are read-only and idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: GeoLite2 databases must be re-downloaded periodically (updated twice weekly) - agents using local files need update automation
License key for GeoLite2 is different from GeoIP2 web service key - separate signup paths
Database file format (MMDB) requires MaxMind's reader library - not a plain CSV/JSON
GeoLite2 accuracy is significantly lower than paid GeoIP2 especially for city-level data
GDPR compliance requires attribution in some GeoLite2 use cases per the license terms
